name: Ucore Rare Metals Inc.
description: Ucore Rare Metals Inc. is a Canadian critical minerals company focused on rare earth element extraction and separation, holding a 100% interest in the Bokan-Dotson Ridge rare earth project on Prince of Wales Island, Alaska, with a recently upgraded mineral resource estimate highlighting a high proportion of heavy rare earth elements. The company is also developing its proprietary RapidSX separation technology with US Department of Defense funding, and is constructing a commercial-scale rare earth refining facility in Louisiana. Ucore is a development-stage company advancing both its Alaskan REE deposit and domestic rare earth processing capabilities.
